hero.tagline: Seeking a life partner rooted in family values, respect, and shared traditions.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I am Bharath Kumar K (Yuvaraj), a B.E. ECE graduate from Bhadravathi. After completing my degree (2016–2020), I prepared for UPSC (2020–2023) before transitioning into software development. I currently work as a Mid Level Full Stack Developer at KinetiCloud. I belong to the Kuruba community with a family background in business and farming. I value honesty, education, and strong family bonds.

timeline.education: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering
timeline.job1: Gaian Solution — Full Stack Java Developer
timeline.job2: KinetiCloud — Mid Level Full Stack Developer

family.title: Family Background
family.description: My father Kanakaraj is engaged in business and farming, and my mother Roopa is a housewife. We belong to a respected Kuruba family from Bhadravathi. We have deep devotion to Kariyappa and Aravamma. I have one younger brother who has completed B.E. in Civil Engineering. We value education, tradition, and strong family bonds.

preferences.title: Partner Preferences
preferences.description: I am looking for an educated, respectful, and family-oriented woman below 27 years of age. Someone who values tradition, kindness, and personal growth. Education: Bachelor's degree or higher preferred. Location preference: Karnataka.

contact.title: Contact & Inquiry

contact.name: Full Name

contact.privacy: All information on this site is shared in good faith for marriage purposes only.
